Business Accelerator

Built to Stay.

A business accelerator for Native Hawaiian, Pacific Islander, and Asian women building the economy Hawaiʻi deserves.

Learn More Support Our Mission

Most accelerators are built for exits. FoundHer is built for roots.

A successful small business is how ʻohana stays in Hawaiʻi, and how the next generation inherits something worth staying for.

Our Impact

Numbers that stay home.

{{ s.icon }}
{{ s.v }}
{{ s.l }}
{{ s.note }}

Our Programs

Two paths. One ʻohana.

Both run six months. Both are built on funding, mentorship, and community. Choose the track that fits where you build.

Cohort 5 · Statewide · All Industries

Pae ʻĀina

A 6-month accelerator for Native Hawaiian, Pacific Islander, and Asian women founders across Hawaiʻi. Open to all industries.

Cohort 1 · Hawaiʻi Island · Agriculture & Food

Kapalili

A Hawaiʻi Island accelerator for NHPIAA wāhine building businesses in agriculture, food production, and local food systems. Grounded in ʻāina values.

What We Offer

Everything a founder needs to build for the long run.

{{ o.v }}
{{ o.l }}
See The Program →
“

Iʼm forever grateful and honored to have been selected for Hawaiʻi FoundHer, which has created space, sisterhood, and focus for us Native women entrepreneurs here in Hawaiʻi.

Mele Jones · Kōkua Diaper

Support FoundHer

The economy weʼre building doesnʼt happen without community behind it.

Every contribution brings another wāhine founder closer to building something that lasts, for her ʻohana, and for all of us.
